productDisplayName: Puma Unisex Beach Flip Green Flip Flops
description: This stylish pair of Beach Flip flip flops from puma makes for a fantastic casual footwear option. The cushioned footbed ensures maximum comfort for the feet, while the bright design gives an edgy look. Stitch detailing coupled with rubber straps creates a perfect combination of comfort and style.   UpperRubber straps in a thong style with brandingToe separator to hold the foot in placeSoft rubber cushioned footbed for in-step comfort with print design and brandingOutsoleTPU outsole with suction points for absolute grip and tractionFlip flop care Wipe surface with clean, damp cloth Do not store in direct sunlight
